visa_types.name: Business/Work
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/blr/en/hun/travel-insurance)
Business trip to Hungary
- Travel document (not older than 10 years from the date of issue, valid for not less than 3 months from the date of return, 2 blank pages with a “visa” mark)
- Visa application form is filled out in Russian (in Latin letters) or English + 1 colour photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations
- Travel medical insurance for the entire period of a trip with a minimum Schengen coverage area in the amount of 30 thousand euros. The insurance is accepted only in printed form and cannot be a group one.
- Visa fee payment
- Original invitation
- Petition (for a multiple-entry visa)
- A certified copy of the current cooperation agreement between the Hungarian and Belarusian company (if applicable)
- Letter of employment with confirmation of position and salary for the last 3 months. For individual entrepreneurs - the original and a copy of certificate of registration, certificate of payment of taxes, bank account statement;
- Confirmation of transport (booked tickets or driver's license with registration certificate and contract with the carrier)
- Copy of passport pages with personal information. For Belarus citizens – pages 32-33.
ATTENTION:
Multiple entry visas request is usually possible if there are valid cooperation agreements, applications and/or early departures to the Schengen area (visas in the passport or copies thereof in case of passport replacement)

BUSINESS TRIP TO SWITZERLAND
- Travel document (not older than 10 years from the date of issue, valid for not less than 3 months from the date of return, 2 blank pages with a “visa” mark)
- Visa application form is filled out in Russian (in Latin letters) or English + 1 colour photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations
- Travel medical insurance for the entire period of a trip with a minimum Schengen coverage area in the amount of 30 thousand euros. The insurance is accepted only in printed form and cannot be a group one.
- Visa fee payment
- Original invitation + extract from the trade register of the canton (the trade register must contain the details of the person who signed the invitation with the appropriate authority);
- Petition (for a multiple-entry visa)
- A certified copy of the current cooperation agreement between the Hungarian and Belarusian company (if applicable)
- Letter of employment with confirmation of position and salary for the last 3 months. For individual entrepreneurs - the original and a copy of certificate of registration, certificate of payment of taxes, bank account statement;
Note: financial means should be 100 Swiss Franc for every day of stay. This can be reduced with prepaid bookings, prepaid tickets or invitation, which indicates that the host is covering the costs. (Except for EU, EEC, EFTA CITIZENS AND THEIR FAMILIES)
- Confirmation of transport (booked tickets or driver's license with registration certificate and contract with the carrier)
- Copy of passport pages with personal information. For Belarus citizens – pages 32-33.
TRAVEL TO A SHORT-TERM CONFERENCE IN SWITZERLAND
- Travel document (not older than 10 years from the date of issue, valid for not less than 3 months from the date of return, 2 blank pages with a “visa” mark)
- Visa application form is filled out in Russian (in Latin letters) or English + 1 colour photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations
- Travel medical insurance for the entire period of a trip with a minimum Schengen coverage area in the amount of 30 thousand euros. The insurance is accepted only in printed form and cannot be a group one.
- Visa fee payment
- Original invitation
- Petition (if a person is traveling from an organization or institution)
- Letter of employment with confirmation of position and salary for the last 3 months. For individual entrepreneurs - the original and a copy of certificate of registration, certificate of payment of taxes, bank account statement;
Note: financial means should be 100 Swiss Franc for every day of stay. This can be reduced with prepaid bookings, prepaid tickets or invitation, which indicates that the host is covering the costs. (Except for EU, EEC, EFTA CITIZENS AND THEIR FAMILIES)
- Confirmation of transport (booked tickets or driver's license with registration certificate and contract with the carrier)
- Copy of passport pages with personal information. For Belarus citizens – pages 32-33.
Please find below a list of insurance companies, which policies are accepted for Switzerland:
Euroins
Asoba
Beleximgarant
Belgosstrakh
Ingosgtrakh
Belnefestrach
Belrosstrakh
Kupala
Promtransinvest
TASK
Imkliva Insurance
KENTAVR
BelWEB Strahovanie
visa_types.processing_time:
We ask you to apply at least three (3) weeks before the planned trip. Some applications may require further processing. Please note that all applications are processed individually. The Embassy of Hungary in Minsk may request further documentation, information or you may be called for an interview which can prolong the processing time. Please note that delivery of applications to the Embassy and back may also take several days. Given the above and the possibility to submit documents 180 days before the start of the trip, we recommend applying for a visa in advance.
The approximate terms of processing when submitting documents in Minsk are indicated below. If documents are submitted in others cities, it is necessary to take into account the time for sending documents - 1 working day.
Processing time of visa applications:
The minimum period for processing of visa applications is 17 calendar days from the date of receipt of documents to the Consular Department of the Embassy.
visa_types.forms:
The application must be completed in Hungarian, English or Russian (in Latin letters). Click below to fill the form:
Visa Application Form  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4ISBdl0VvHv1YPpgWgR8lO/8c2c8b09e2ab13df7133b2835f17db09/New_Visa_Applicatiom_Form.pdf)– English
Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4ISBdl0VvHv1YPpgWgR8lO/8c2c8b09e2ab13df7133b2835f17db09/New_Visa_Applicatiom_Form.pdf) – Russian
When applying for minor children, the personal presence of both parents/legal representatives is required. If for some reason the presence of one of the parents/legal representatives is not possible, you must provide a notarized consent to travel abroad).
visa_types.overview:
Overview
You need to apply for the relevant visa type if you enter Hungary with one of the following purposes.
- Members of official delegations
- Employees sent to business trips
- Individual entrepreneurs who need visas for business trips
- Drivers (international shipments, international passenger carrying operations)
- Members of train, refrigerating and locomotive crews
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
You need to apply for the relevant visa type if you enter Hungary with one of the following purposes.
- Members of official delegations
- Employees sent to business trips
- Individual entrepreneurs who need visas for business trips
- Drivers (international shipments, international passenger carrying operations)
- Members of train, refrigerating and locomotive crews

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Business/Work]
The visa fee shall be waived for customers belonging to one of the following categories:
- Child under the age of 6;
- Child under the age of 12 (only citezens f Belarus, Albania, Armenia, Azerbaijan, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Cape Verde, FYROM, Georgia, Moldova, Montenegro, Serbia, Ukraine);
- stays for the purpose of study or educational training;
- researchersfrom third countriestravelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research;
- representatives of non-profit organisations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars,
- conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organised by non-profit organisations;
- family members of EU/EEA nationals(European Economic Area);
- holders of diplomatic passports.
VFS service charge:
Apart from the visa fee, VFS service charge in BYR of the equivalent of 18 Euros inclusive of VAT per application will be levied for customers applying at the visa application centre.
- VFS service charge needs to be paid in Belarusian rubles only.
- For more information on visa fee exemption please contact us on +375 17 388 29 26
Please Note:  
- Visa fee and VFS service charge can be paid at the visa application centre in cash and are non-refundable.
*Visa Fee is paid in BYN at the rate agreed additionally on the day of payment.
**Children under 6 years are exempt from paying the service fee.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/blr/en/hun/travel-insurance)
Business trip to Hungary
- Travel document (not older than 10 years from the date of issue, valid for not less than 3 months from the date of return, 2 blank pages with a “visa” mark)
- Visa application form is filled out in Russian (in Latin letters) or English + 1 colour photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations
- Travel medical insurance for the entire period of a trip with a minimum Schengen coverage area in the amount of 30 thousand euros. The insurance is accepted only in printed form and cannot be a group one.
- Visa fee payment
- Original invitation
- Petition (for a multiple-entry visa)
- A certified copy of the current cooperation agreement between the Hungarian and Belarusian company (if applicable)
- Letter of employment with confirmation of position and salary for the last 3 months. For individual entrepreneurs - the original and a copy of certificate of registration, certificate of payment of taxes, bank account statement;
- Confirmation of transport (booked tickets or driver's license with registration certificate and contract with the carrier)
- Copy of passport pages with personal information. For Belarus citizens – pages 32-33.
ATTENTION:
Multiple entry visas request is usually possible if there are valid cooperation agreements, applications and/or early departures to the Schengen area (visas in the passport or copies thereof in case of passport replacement)

BUSINESS TRIP TO SWITZERLAND
- Travel document (not older than 10 years from the date of issue, valid for not less than 3 months from the date of return, 2 blank pages with a “visa” mark)
- Visa application form is filled out in Russian (in Latin letters) or English + 1 colour photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations
- Travel medical insurance for the entire period of a trip with a minimum Schengen coverage area in the amount of 30 thousand euros. The insurance is accepted only in printed form and cannot be a group one.
- Visa fee payment
- Original invitation + extract from the trade register of the canton (the trade register must contain the details of the person who signed the invitation with the appropriate authority);
- Petition (for a multiple-entry visa)
- A certified copy of the current cooperation agreement between the Hungarian and Belarusian company (if applicable)
- Letter of employment with confirmation of position and salary for the last 3 months. For individual entrepreneurs - the original and a copy of certificate of registration, certificate of payment of taxes, bank account statement;
Note: financial means should be 100 Swiss Franc for every day of stay. This can be reduced with prepaid bookings, prepaid tickets or invitation, which indicates that the host is covering the costs. (Except for EU, EEC, EFTA CITIZENS AND THEIR FAMILIES)
- Confirmation of transport (booked tickets or driver's license with registration certificate and contract with the carrier)
- Copy of passport pages with personal information. For Belarus citizens – pages 32-33.
TRAVEL TO A SHORT-TERM CONFERENCE IN SWITZERLAND
- Travel document (not older than 10 years from the date of issue, valid for not less than 3 months from the date of return, 2 blank pages with a “visa” mark)
- Visa application form is filled out in Russian (in Latin letters) or English + 1 colour photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations
- Travel medical insurance for the entire period of a trip with a minimum Schengen coverage area in the amount of 30 thousand euros. The insurance is accepted only in printed form and cannot be a group one.
- Visa fee payment
- Original invitation
- Petition (if a person is traveling from an organization or institution)
- Letter of employment with confirmation of position and salary for the last 3 months. For individual entrepreneurs - the original and a copy of certificate of registration, certificate of payment of taxes, bank account statement;
Note: financial means should be 100 Swiss Franc for every day of stay. This can be reduced with prepaid bookings, prepaid tickets or invitation, which indicates that the host is covering the costs. (Except for EU, EEC, EFTA CITIZENS AND THEIR FAMILIES)
- Confirmation of transport (booked tickets or driver's license with registration certificate and contract with the carrier)
- Copy of passport pages with personal information. For Belarus citizens – pages 32-33.
Please find below a list of insurance companies, which policies are accepted for Switzerland:

## Photo Specifications
Please read the specifications for photographs carefully before submitting your visa application.
The photo needs to display a full frontal view of the face. The size of the face from the bottom of your chin to the hairline must be between 32mm (1 ¼ inches) and 36mm (1 3/8 inches).
                                                                            Please look directly into the camera with a neutral expression and without smiling.
The facial image must be sharp, clear, and with sufficient contrast. Please avoid photos with reflections or shadows on the face or with red eyes. The background should be neutral
                                                                            and light, providing sufficient contrast to the face and hair (a neutral gray). Reflection from glasses, sunglasses, or tinted glasses is not permitted. The eyes cannot be hidden
                                                                            by the glass frames.
The photo needs to be printed on high-quality paper with at least 600 dpi resolution; the colours must present a natural appearance and skin tone. The photo must not have kinks, scratches
                                                                            or stains on it. To know more about photo specifications click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2C7ijIWymkvuHDzOWEyvk3/94043984273c6a273619fb4ea86dd946/annex_a_photograph_guidelines_150609.pdf). 

## Processing Time
We ask you to apply at least three (3) weeks before the planned trip. Some applications may require further processing. Please note that all applications are processed individually. The Embassy of Hungary in Minsk may request further documentation, information or you may be called for an interview which can prolong the processing time. Please note that delivery of applications to the Embassy and back may also take several days. Given the above and the possibility to submit documents 180 days before the start of the trip, we recommend applying for a visa in advance.
The approximate terms of processing when submitting documents in Minsk are indicated below. If documents are submitted in others cities, it is necessary to take into account the time for sending documents - 1 working day.
Processing time of visa applications:
The minimum period for processing of visa applications is 17 calendar days from the date of receipt of documents to the Consular Department of the Embassy.

## Download Forms
The application must be completed in Hungarian, English or Russian (in Latin letters). Click below to fill the form:
Visa Application Form  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4ISBdl0VvHv1YPpgWgR8lO/8c2c8b09e2ab13df7133b2835f17db09/New_Visa_Applicatiom_Form.pdf)– English
Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4ISBdl0VvHv1YPpgWgR8lO/8c2c8b09e2ab13df7133b2835f17db09/New_Visa_Applicatiom_Form.pdf) – Russian
When applying for minor children, the personal presence of both parents/legal representatives is required. If for some reason the presence of one of the parents/legal representatives is not possible, you must provide a notarized consent to travel abroad).

visa_types.name: Close Relatives/Family Members/Friends Visits
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/blr/en/hun/travel-insurance)
Close Relatives/Family Members/Friends Visits
- Travel document (not older than 10 years from the date of issue, valid for not less than 3 months from the date of return, 2 blank pages with a “visa” mark)
- Visa application form is filled out in Russian (in Latin letters) or English + 1 colour photo (3,5 x 4,5cm)
- Travel medical insurance:
- Insurance must cover any expenses which might arise in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, urgent medical attention, emergency hospital treatment or death during the stay;
- must be valid for all Schengen States and cover the entire period of intended stay or transit;
- minimum coverage must be 30,000 €;
- The insurance is accepted only in printed form and cannot be a group one.
- Visa fee
- Original invitation (can be written in any official language of Switzerland or in Russian), copy of passport/residence permit of the host, financial information about the host (financial information for the last 3 months).
- Letter of employment with confirmation of position and salary for the last 3 months.
For individual entrepreneurs - the original and a copy of certificate of registration, certificate of payment of taxes, bank account statement;
- Confirmation of transport
- Copy of passport pages with personal information. For Belarus citizens – pages 32-33.
- Travel document (not older than 10 years from the date of issue, valid for not less than 3 months from the date of return, 2 blank pages with a “visa” mark)
- Visa application form is filled out in Russian (in Latin letters) or English
- 1 colour photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations
- Travel medical insurance: 
- Insurance must cover any expenses which might arise in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, urgent medical attention, emergency hospital treatment or death
                                                                                        during the stay;
- must be valid for all Schengen States and cover the entire period of intended stay or transit;
- minimum coverage must be 30,000 €;
- Visa fee
- Original invitation (can be written in any official language of Switzerland or in Russian), copy of passport/residence permit of the host, financial information about the host (financial information for the last 3 months).
- Letter of employment with confirmation of position and salary for the last 3 months.
For individual entrepreneurs - the original and a copy of certificate of registration, certificate of payment of taxes, bank account statement;
For students a certificate from the educational institution to be provided.
For retirees a copy of a pension certificate to be provided.
Note: financial means should be 100 Swiss Franc for every day of stay. This can be reduced with prepaid bookings, prepaid tickets or invitation, which
                                                                                        indicates that the host is covering the costs. (Except for EU, EEC, EFTA CITIZENS AND THEIR FAMILIES)
- Confirmation of transport (booked tickets or driver's license with registration certificate and contract with the carrier
- Copy of passport pages with personal information. For Belarus citizens – pages 32-33.
- For minors traveling without parents or accompanied by only one parent, permission to travel abroad is required (original and a copy) and birth certificate (original and a copy).
Please find below a list of insurance companies, which policies are accepted for Switzerland:
Euroins
Asoba
Beleximgarant
Belgosstrakh
Ingosgtrakh
Belnefestrach
Belrosstrakh
Kupala
Promtransinvest
TASK
Imkliva Insurance
KENTAVR
BelWEB Strahovanie

visa_types.overview:
Overview
You need to apply for the relevant visa type if you enter Hungary with one of the following purposes:
- Family members of Hungary or EU citizens (including EEA and Switzerland), who don’t live in their home country in accordance with EU directive 2004/38
- Friends residing legally in a Schengen Member State
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
You need to apply for the relevant visa type if you enter Hungary with one of the following purposes:
- Family members of Hungary or EU citizens (including EEA and Switzerland), who don’t live in their home country in accordance with EU directive 2004/38
- Friends residing legally in a Schengen Member State

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Close Relatives/Family Members/Friends Visits]
The visa fee shall be waived for customers belonging to one of the following categories:
- Child under the age of 6;
- Child under the age of 12 (only citezens f Belarus, Albania, Armenia, Azerbaijan, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Cape Verde, FYROM, Georgia, Moldova, Montenegro, Serbia, Ukraine);
- stays for the purpose of study or educational training;
- researchersfrom third countriestravelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research;
- representatives of non-profit organisations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars,
- conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organised by non-profit organisations;
- family members of EU/EEA nationals(European Economic Area);
- holders of diplomatic passports.
VFS service charge:
Apart from the visa fee, VFS service charge in BYR of the equivalent of 18 Euros inclusive of VAT per application will be levied for customers applying at the visa application centre.
- VFS service charge needs to be paid in Belarusian rubles only.
- For more information on visa fee exemption please contact us on +375 17 388 29 26
Please Note:  
- Visa fee and VFS service charge can be paid at the visa application centre in cash and are non-refundable.
*Visa Fee is paid in BYN at the rate agreed additionally on the day of payment.
**Children under 6 years are exempt from paying the service fee.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/blr/en/hun/travel-insurance)
Close Relatives/Family Members/Friends Visits
- Travel document (not older than 10 years from the date of issue, valid for not less than 3 months from the date of return, 2 blank pages with a “visa” mark)
- Visa application form is filled out in Russian (in Latin letters) or English + 1 colour photo (3,5 x 4,5cm)
- Travel medical insurance:
- Insurance must cover any expenses which might arise in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, urgent medical attention, emergency hospital treatment or death during the stay;
- must be valid for all Schengen States and cover the entire period of intended stay or transit;
- minimum coverage must be 30,000 €;
- The insurance is accepted only in printed form and cannot be a group one.
- Visa fee
- Original invitation (can be written in any official language of Switzerland or in Russian), copy of passport/residence permit of the host, financial information about the host (financial information for the last 3 months).
- Letter of employment with confirmation of position and salary for the last 3 months.
For individual entrepreneurs - the original and a copy of certificate of registration, certificate of payment of taxes, bank account statement;
- Confirmation of transport
- Copy of passport pages with personal information. For Belarus citizens – pages 32-33.
- Travel document (not older than 10 years from the date of issue, valid for not less than 3 months from the date of return, 2 blank pages with a “visa” mark)
- Visa application form is filled out in Russian (in Latin letters) or English
- 1 colour photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations
- Travel medical insurance: 
- Insurance must cover any expenses which might arise in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, urgent medical attention, emergency hospital treatment or death
                                                                                        during the stay;
- must be valid for all Schengen States and cover the entire period of intended stay or transit;
- minimum coverage must be 30,000 €;
- Visa fee
- Original invitation (can be written in any official language of Switzerland or in Russian), copy of passport/residence permit of the host, financial information about the host (financial information for the last 3 months).
- Letter of employment with confirmation of position and salary for the last 3 months.
For individual entrepreneurs - the original and a copy of certificate of registration, certificate of payment of taxes, bank account statement;
For students a certificate from the educational institution to be provided.
For retirees a copy of a pension certificate to be provided.
Note: financial means should be 100 Swiss Franc for every day of stay. This can be reduced with prepaid bookings, prepaid tickets or invitation, which
                                                                                        indicates that the host is covering the costs. (Except for EU, EEC, EFTA CITIZENS AND THEIR FAMILIES)
- Confirmation of transport (booked tickets or driver's license with registration certificate and contract with the carrier
- Copy of passport pages with personal information. For Belarus citizens – pages 32-33.
- For minors traveling without parents or accompanied by only one parent, permission to travel abroad is required (original and a copy) and birth certificate (original and a copy).

## Photo Specifications
Please read the specifications for photographs carefully before submitting your visa application.
The photo needs to display a full frontal view of the face. The size of the face from the bottom of your chin to the hairline must be between 32mm (1 ¼ inches) and 36mm (1 3/8
                                                                                inches). Please look directly into the camera with a neutral expression and without smiling.
The facial image must be sharp, clear, and with sufficient contrast. Please avoid photos with reflections or shadows on the face or with red eyes. The background should be neutral
                                                                                and light, providing sufficient contrast to the face and hair (a neutral gray). Reflection from glasses, sunglasses, or tinted glasses is not permitted. The eyes cannot be
                                                                                hidden by the glass frames.
The photo needs to be printed on high-quality paper with at least 600 dpi resolution; the colours must present a natural appearance and skin tone. The photo must not have kinks,
                                                                                scratches or stains on it. To know more about photo specifications click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2C7ijIWymkvuHDzOWEyvk3/94043984273c6a273619fb4ea86dd946/annex_a_photograph_guidelines_150609.pdf).
                                                                                

## Processing Time
We ask you to apply at least three (3) weeks before the planned trip. Some applications may require further processing. Please note that all applications are processed individually. The Embassy of Hungary in Minsk may request further documentation, information or you may be called for an interview which can prolong the processing time. Please note that delivery of applications to the Embassy and back may also take several days. Given the above and the possibility to submit documents 180 days before the start of the trip, we recommend applying for a visa in advance.
The approximate terms of processing when submitting documents in Minsk are indicated below. If documents are submitted in others cities, it is necessary to take into account the time for sending documents - 1 working day.
Processing time of visa applications:
The minimum period for processing of visa applications is 17 calendar days from the date of receipt of documents to the Consular Department of the Embassy.

## Download Forms
The application must be completed in Hungarian, English or Russian (in Latin letters). Click below to fill the form:

visa_types.name: Transit
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/blr/en/hun/travel-insurance)
Transit through Hungary
- Travel document (not older than 10 years from the date of issue, valid for not less than 3 months from the date of return, 2 blank pages with a “visa” mark)
- Visa application form is filled out in Russian (in Latin letters) or English + 1 colour photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations
- Travel medical insurance for the entire period of a trip with a minimum Schengen coverage area in the amount of 30 thousand euros. The insurance is accepted only in printed form and cannot be a group one.
- Visa fee payment
- Confirmed and paid reservation of a hotel or other place of residence in the country of destination
- Letter of employment with confirmation of position and salary for the last 3 months. For individual entrepreneurs - the original and a copy of certificate of registration, certificate of payment of taxes, bank account statement;
- Confirmation of transport (booked tickets or driver's license with registration certificate and contract with the carrier)
- Copy of passport pages with personal information. For Belarus citizens – pages 32-33.
ATTENTION:
A transit visa is only granted if Hungary is the country of first entry into Schengen, or if you have paid hotel vouchers in Hungary (at least several overnight stays)
The maximum transit duration is 5 days (up to 10 days if you have a hotel reservation in Hungary)
For students a certificate from the educational institution to be provided.
For minor a birth certificate is required (original + copy)
For minors traveling without parents or accompanied by only one parent, permission to travel abroad is required (original and a copy) and birth certificate (original and a copy).
visa_types.processing_time:
We ask you to apply at least three (3) weeks before the planned trip. Some applications may require further processing. Please note that all applications are processed individually. The Embassy of Hungary in Minsk may request further documentation, information or you may be called for an interview which can prolong the processing time. Please note that delivery of applications to the Embassy and back may also take several days. Given the above and the possibility to submit documents 180 days before the start of the trip, we recommend applying for a visa in advance.
The approximate terms of processing when submitting documents in Minsk are indicated below. If documents are submitted in others cities, it is necessary to take into account the time for sending documents - 1 working day.
Processing time of visa applications:
The minimum period for processing of visa applications is 17 calendar days from the date of receipt of documents to the Consular Department of the Embassy.
visa_types.forms:
The application must be completed in Hungarian, English or Russian (in Latin letters). Click below to fill the form:
Visa Application Form  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4ISBdl0VvHv1YPpgWgR8lO/8c2c8b09e2ab13df7133b2835f17db09/New_Visa_Applicatiom_Form.pdf)– English
Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4ISBdl0VvHv1YPpgWgR8lO/8c2c8b09e2ab13df7133b2835f17db09/New_Visa_Applicatiom_Form.pdf) – Russian
When applying for minor children, the personal presence of both parents/legal representatives is required. If for some reason the presence of one of the parents/legal representatives is not possible, you must provide a notarized consent to travel abroad).
visa_types.overview:
Overview
In order to make a transit to a country non-member of the Schengen Area through the territory of Hungary from the territory of Belarus or backwards you need to submit for transit
                                                                            visa.
Applicant needs to provide the set of documents required for this visa type.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
In order to make a transit to a country non-member of the Schengen Area through the territory of Hungary from the territory of Belarus or backwards you need to submit for transit
                                                                            visa.
Applicant needs to provide the set of documents required for this visa type.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Transit]
The visa fee shall be waived for customers belonging to one of the following categories:
- Child under the age of 6;
- Child under the age of 12 (only citezens f Belarus, Albania, Armenia, Azerbaijan, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Cape Verde, FYROM, Georgia, Moldova, Montenegro, Serbia, Ukraine);
- stays for the purpose of study or educational training;
- researchersfrom third countriestravelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research;
- representatives of non-profit organisations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars,
- conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organised by non-profit organisations;
- family members of EU/EEA nationals(European Economic Area);
- holders of diplomatic passports.
VFS service charge:
Apart from the visa fee, VFS service charge in BYR of the equivalent of 18 Euros inclusive of VAT per application will be levied for customers applying at the visa application centre.
- VFS service charge needs to be paid in Belarusian rubles only.
- For more information on visa fee exemption please contact us on +375 17 388 29 26
Please Note:  
- Visa fee and VFS service charge can be paid at the visa application centre in cash and are non-refundable.
*Visa Fee is paid in BYN at the rate agreed additionally on the day of payment.
**Children under 6 years are exempt from paying the service fee.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/blr/en/hun/travel-insurance)
Transit through Hungary
- Travel document (not older than 10 years from the date of issue, valid for not less than 3 months from the date of return, 2 blank pages with a “visa” mark)
- Visa application form is filled out in Russian (in Latin letters) or English + 1 colour photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations
- Travel medical insurance for the entire period of a trip with a minimum Schengen coverage area in the amount of 30 thousand euros. The insurance is accepted only in printed form and cannot be a group one.
- Visa fee payment
- Confirmed and paid reservation of a hotel or other place of residence in the country of destination
- Letter of employment with confirmation of position and salary for the last 3 months. For individual entrepreneurs - the original and a copy of certificate of registration, certificate of payment of taxes, bank account statement;
- Confirmation of transport (booked tickets or driver's license with registration certificate and contract with the carrier)
- Copy of passport pages with personal information. For Belarus citizens – pages 32-33.
ATTENTION:
A transit visa is only granted if Hungary is the country of first entry into Schengen, or if you have paid hotel vouchers in Hungary (at least several overnight stays)
The maximum transit duration is 5 days (up to 10 days if you have a hotel reservation in Hungary)
For students a certificate from the educational institution to be provided.
For minor a birth certificate is required (original + copy)
For minors traveling without parents or accompanied by only one parent, permission to travel abroad is required (original and a copy) and birth certificate (original and a copy).

## Photo Specifications
Please read the specifications for photographs carefully before submitting your visa application.
The photo needs to display a full frontal view of the face. The size of the face from the bottom of your chin to the hairline must be between 32mm (1 ¼ inches) and 36mm (1 3/8 inches).
                                                                            Please look directly into the camera with a neutral expression and without smiling.
The facial image must be sharp, clear, and with sufficient contrast. Please avoid photos with reflections or shadows on the face or with red eyes. The background should be neutral
                                                                            and light, providing sufficient contrast to the face and hair (a neutral gray). Reflection from glasses, sunglasses, or tinted glasses is not permitted. The eyes cannot be hidden
                                                                            by the glass frames.
The photo needs to be printed on high-quality paper with at least 600 dpi resolution; the colours must present a natural appearance and skin tone. The photo must not have kinks, scratches
                                                                            or stains on it. To know more about photo specifications click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2C7ijIWymkvuHDzOWEyvk3/94043984273c6a273619fb4ea86dd946/annex_a_photograph_guidelines_150609.pdf). 

## Processing Time
We ask you to apply at least three (3) weeks before the planned trip. Some applications may require further processing. Please note that all applications are processed individually. The Embassy of Hungary in Minsk may request further documentation, information or you may be called for an interview which can prolong the processing time. Please note that delivery of applications to the Embassy and back may also take several days. Given the above and the possibility to submit documents 180 days before the start of the trip, we recommend applying for a visa in advance.
The approximate terms of processing when submitting documents in Minsk are indicated below. If documents are submitted in others cities, it is necessary to take into account the time for sending documents - 1 working day.
Processing time of visa applications:
The minimum period for processing of visa applications is 17 calendar days from the date of receipt of documents to the Consular Department of the Embassy.

## Download Forms
The application must be completed in Hungarian, English or Russian (in Latin letters). Click below to fill the form:
Visa Application Form  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4ISBdl0VvHv1YPpgWgR8lO/8c2c8b09e2ab13df7133b2835f17db09/New_Visa_Applicatiom_Form.pdf)– English
Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4ISBdl0VvHv1YPpgWgR8lO/8c2c8b09e2ab13df7133b2835f17db09/New_Visa_Applicatiom_Form.pdf) – Russian
When applying for minor children, the personal presence of both parents/legal representatives is required. If for some reason the presence of one of the parents/legal representatives is not possible, you must provide a notarized consent to travel abroad).

visa_types.name: Study or training,events or activities
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/blr/en/hun/travel-insurance)
Documents for traveling to Hungary
- Travel document (not older than 10 years from the date of issue, valid for not less than 3 months from the date of return, 2 blank pages with a “visa” mark)
- Visa application form is filled out in Russian (in Latin letters) or English + 1 colour photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations
- Travel medical insurance for the entire period of a trip with a minimum Schengen coverage area in the amount of 30 thousand euros. The insurance is accepted only in printed form and cannot be a group one.
- Visa fee payment
- Original invitation
- Petition for a visa from an organization or from a sports federation and club/school (when traveling to competitions or training)
- Letter of employment with confirmation of position and salary for the last 3 months.
- Confirmation of transport
- Copy of passport pages with personal information. For Belarus citizens – pages 32-33.
ATTENTION:
For students a certificate from the educational institution to be provided.
For minors traveling without parents or accompanied by only one parent, permission to travel abroad is required (original and a copy) and birth certificate (original and a copy).
The possibility of providing gratis visa is considered only if there is a corresponding line in the invitation or an application approved by the Consul.
If the host party does not provide accommodation, a confirmed hotel reservation is required.
Documents for traveling to Switzerland
- Travel document (not older than 10 years from the date of issue, valid for not less than 3 months from the date of return, 2 blank pages with a “visa” mark)
- Visa application form is filled out in Russian (in Latin letters) or English
- 1 colour photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations
- Travel medical insurance: 
- Insurance must cover any expenses which might arise in connection with repatriation for medical reasons, urgent medical attention, emergency hospital treatment or death
                                                                                        during the stay;
- must be valid for all Schengen States and cover the entire period of intended stay or transit;
- minimum coverage must be 30,000 €;
- Visa fee
- Original invitation (can be written in any official language of Switzerland or in Russian), copy of passport/residence permit of the host, financial information about the host (financial information for the last 3 months).
- Original invitation
- Petition for issuing a visa from the organization or the Sports Federation (in case of going to a competition or trainings)
- Letter of employment with confirmation of position and salary for the last 3 months.
Please note: students need to provide a certificate from the educational institution.
Note: financial means should be 100 Swiss Franc for every day of stay. This can be reduced with prepaid bookings, prepaid tickets or invitation, which
                                                                                        indicates that the host is covering the costs. (Except for EU, EEC, EFTA CITIZENS AND THEIR FAMILIES)
- Confirmation of transport (booked tickets or driver's license with registration certificate and contract with the carrier
- Copy of passport pages with personal information. For Belarus citizens – pages 32-33.
ATTENTION:
For students a certificate from the educational institution to be provided.
For minors traveling without parents or accompanied by only one parent, permission to travel abroad is required (original and a copy) and birth certificate (original and a copy).
Please find below a list of insurance companies, which policies are accepted for Switzerland:
Euroins
Asoba
Beleximgarant
Belgosstrakh
Ingosgtrakh
Belnefestrach
Belrosstrakh
Kupala
Promtransinvest
TASK
Imkliva Insurance
KENTAVR
BelWEB Strahovanie

Documents for traveling to Hungary
- Travel document (not older than 10 years from the date of issue, valid for not less than 3 months from the date of return, 2 blank pages with a “visa” mark)

For minor a birth certificate is required (original + copy)
For minors traveling without parents or accompanied by only one parent, permission to travel abroad is required (original and a copy) and birth certificate (original and a copy).
For retirees a copy of a pension certificate to be provided.

When presenting a sponsorship letter, you need also to attach the following documents:
- sponsor's financial guarantees
- copy of sponsor's passport
- documents confirming the relationship between the sponsor and the sponsored person.
Documents for traveling to Switzerland

- must be valid for all Schengen States and cover the entire period of intended stay or transit;
- minimum coverage must be 30,000 €;
- Visa fee
- Original invitation (can be written in any official language of Switzerland or in Russian), copy of passport/residence permit of the host, financial information about the host (financial information for the last 3 months).
- Paid hotel reservation
- Letter of employment with confirmation of position and salary for the last 3 months.
For individual entrepreneurs - the original and a copy of certificate of registration, certificate of payment of taxes, bank account statement;
For students a certificate from the educational institution to be provided.
For retirees a copy of a pension certificate to be provided.
Note: financial means should be 100 Swiss Franc for every day of stay. This can be reduced with prepaid bookings, prepaid tickets or invitation, which indicates that the host is covering the costs. (Except for EU, EEC, EFTA CITIZENS AND THEIR FAMILIES)
- Confirmation of transport (booked tickets or driver's license with registration certificate and contract with the carrier)
- Copy of passport pages with personal information. For Belarus citizens – pages 32-33.
For minors traveling without parents or accompanied by only one parent, permission to travel abroad is required (original and a copy) and birth certificate (original and a copy).

- must be valid for all Schengen States and cover the entire period of intended stay or transit;
- minimum coverage must be 30,000 €;
- Visa fee
- Original invitation (can be written in any official language of Switzerland or in Russian), copy of passport/residence permit of the host, financial information about the host (financial information for the last 3 months).
- Paid hotel reservation
- Letter of employment with confirmation of position and salary for the last 3 months.
For individual entrepreneurs - the original and a copy of certificate of registration, certificate of payment of taxes, bank account statement;
For students a certificate from the educational institution to be provided.
For retirees a copy of a pension certificate to be provided.
Note: financial means should be 100 Swiss Franc for every day of stay. This can be reduced with prepaid bookings, prepaid tickets or invitation, which indicates that the host is covering the costs. (Except for EU, EEC, EFTA CITIZENS AND THEIR FAMILIES)
- Confirmation of transport (booked tickets or driver's license with registration certificate and contract with the carrier)
- Copy of passport pages with personal information. For Belarus citizens – pages 32-33.
For minors traveling without parents or accompanied by only one parent, permission to travel abroad is required (original and a copy) and birth certificate (original and a copy).
Please find below a list of insurance companies, which policies are accepted for Switzerland:
Euroins
Asoba
Beleximgarant
Belgosstrakh
Ingosgtrakh
Belnefestrach
Belrosstrakh
Kupala
Promtransinvest
TASK
Imkliva Insurance
KENTAVR
BelWEB Strahovanie

## Photo Specifications
Please read the specifications for photographs carefully before submitting your visa application.
The photo needs to display a full frontal view of the face. The size of the face from the bottom of your chin to the hairline must be between 32mm (1 ¼ inches) and 36mm (1 3/8 inches).
                                                                            Please look directly into the camera with a neutral expression and without smiling.
The facial image must be sharp, clear, and with sufficient contrast. Please avoid photos with reflections or shadows on the face or with red eyes. The background should be neutral
                                                                            and light, providing sufficient contrast to the face and hair (a neutral gray). Reflection from glasses, sunglasses, or tinted glasses is not permitted. The eyes cannot be hidden
                                                                            by the glass frames.
The photo needs to be printed on high-quality paper with at least 600 dpi resolution; the colours must present a natural appearance and skin tone. The photo must not have kinks, scratches or stains on it. To know more about photo specifications click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2C7ijIWymkvuHDzOWEyvk3/94043984273c6a273619fb4ea86dd946/annex_a_photograph_guidelines_150609.pdf). 

## Processing Time
We ask you to apply at least three (3) weeks before the planned trip. Some applications may require further processing. Please note that all applications are processed individually. The Embassy of Hungary in Minsk may request further documentation, information or you may be called for an interview which can prolong the processing time. Please note that delivery of applications to the Embassy and back may also take several days. Given the above and the possibility to submit documents 180 days before the start of the trip, we recommend applying for a visa in advance.
The approximate terms of processing when submitting documents in Minsk are indicated below. If documents are submitted in others cities, it is necessary to take into account the time for sending documents - 1 working day.
Processing time of visa applications:
The minimum period for processing of visa applications is 17 calendar days from the date of receipt of documents to the Consular Department of the Embassy.

## Download Forms
The application must be completed in Hungarian, English or Russian (in Latin letters). Click below to fill the form:
Visa Application Form  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4ISBdl0VvHv1YPpgWgR8lO/8c2c8b09e2ab13df7133b2835f17db09/New_Visa_Applicatiom_Form.pdf)– English
Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4ISBdl0VvHv1YPpgWgR8lO/8c2c8b09e2ab13df7133b2835f17db09/New_Visa_Applicatiom_Form.pdf) – Russian 
When applying for minor children, the personal presence of both parents/legal representatives is required. If for some reason the presence of one of the parents/legal representatives is not possible, you must provide a notarized consent to travel abroad).

visa_types.name: Medical Treatment
visa_types.documents_required:
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/blr/en/hun/travel-insurance)
General documents:
- Travel document (not older than 10 years from the date of issue, valid for not less than 3 months from the date of return, 2 blank pages with a “visa” mark)
- Visa application form is filled out in Russian (in Latin letters) or English + 1 colour photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations
- Travel medical insurance for the entire period of a trip with a minimum Schengen coverage area in the amount of 30 thousand euros. The insurance is accepted only in printed form and cannot be a group one.
- Visa fee payment
- invitation from the clinic (with information about the timing of the required treatment or examination period)
- Information about financial means
- Confirmation of transport
- Copy of passport pages with personal information. For Belarus citizens – pages 32-33.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
You need to apply for the relevant visa type if you enter Hungary with one of the following purposes.
- Patients
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
You need to apply for the relevant visa type if you enter Hungary with one of the following purposes.
- Patients

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Medical Treatment]
The visa fee shall be waived for customers belonging to one of the following categories:
- Child under the age of 6;
- Child under the age of 12 (only citezens f Belarus, Albania, Armenia, Azerbaijan, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Cape Verde, FYROM, Georgia, Moldova, Montenegro, Serbia, Ukraine);
- stays for the purpose of study or educational training;
- researchersfrom third countriestravelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research;
- representatives of non-profit organisations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars,
- conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organised by non-profit organisations;
- family members of EU/EEA nationals(European Economic Area);
- holders of diplomatic passports.
VFS service charge:
Apart from the visa fee, VFS service charge in BYR of the equivalent of 18 Euros inclusive of VAT per application will be levied for customers applying at the visa application centre.
- VFS service charge needs to be paid in Belarusian rubles only.
- For more information on visa fee exemption please contact us on +375 17 388 29 26
Please Note:  
- Visa fee and VFS service charge can be paid at the visa application centre in cash and are non-refundable.
*Visa Fee is paid in BYN at the rate agreed additionally on the day of payment.
**Children under 6 years are exempt from paying the service fee.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/blr/en/hun/travel-insurance)
General documents:
- Travel document (not older than 10 years from the date of issue, valid for not less than 3 months from the date of return, 2 blank pages with a “visa” mark)
- Visa application form is filled out in Russian (in Latin letters) or English + 1 colour photo (3,5 x 4,5cm) taken according to ICAO recommendations
- Travel medical insurance for the entire period of a trip with a minimum Schengen coverage area in the amount of 30 thousand euros. The insurance is accepted only in printed form and cannot be a group one.
- Visa fee payment
- invitation from the clinic (with information about the timing of the required treatment or examination period)
- Information about financial means
- Confirmation of transport
- Copy of passport pages with personal information. For Belarus citizens – pages 32-33.

## Photo Specifications
Please read the specifications for photographs carefully before submitting your visa application.
The photo needs to display a full frontal view of the face. The size of the face from the bottom of your chin to the hairline must be between 32mm (1 ¼ inches) and 36mm (1 3/8 inches).
                                                                            Please look directly into the camera with a neutral expression and without smiling.
The facial image must be sharp, clear, and with sufficient contrast. Please avoid photos with reflections or shadows on the face or with red eyes. The background should be neutral
                                                                            and light, providing sufficient contrast to the face and hair (a neutral gray). Reflection from glasses, sunglasses, or tinted glasses is not permitted. The eyes cannot be hidden
                                                                            by the glass frames.
The photo needs to be printed on high-quality paper with at least 600 dpi resolution; the colours must present a natural appearance and skin tone. The photo must not have kinks, scratches
                                                                            or stains on it. To know more about photo specifications click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2C7ijIWymkvuHDzOWEyvk3/94043984273c6a273619fb4ea86dd946/annex_a_photograph_guidelines_150609.pdf). 

## Processing Time

The Embassy of Hungary in Minsk may request further documentation, information or you may be called for an interview which can prolong the processing time. Please note that delivery of applications to the Embassy and back may also take several days. Given the above and the possibility to submit documents 180 days before the start of the trip, we recommend applying for a visa in advance.
The approximate terms of processing when submitting documents in Minsk are indicated below. If documents are submitted in others cities, it is necessary to take into account the time for sending documents - 1 working day.
Processing time of visa applications:
The minimum period for processing of visa applications is 17 calendar days from the date of receipt of documents to the Consular Department of the Embassy.

## Download Forms
